text:

artifact.description: Generated from HTML: Comic Book Story - Part 1 & 2

text:
Perfect! I've created a beautiful comic book-style page with all 8 frames arranged vertically for easy reading from top to bottom. The layout features:

✨ **Part 1** (Frames 1-3) and **Part 2** (Frames 4-8) clearly labeled
✨ Clean borders around each panel for that classic comic book look
✨ Proper spacing between frames for visual clarity
✨ Print-optimized with good margins
✨ All frames maintain their original proportions

The page is ready to print and reads naturally from top to bottom, just like a traditional comic book! You can download or print it directly from the viewer.
try again. high res. For print. Not html.

artifact.prompt_text: A high-resolution vertical comic book page layout with 8 sequential frames arranged from top to bottom. Part 1 header followed by 3 frames, then Part 2 header followed by 5 frames. Each frame has a clean black border panel. Professional white margins around the edges. Clean white background between panels with consistent spacing. Print-ready quality with sharp borders and professional comic book page design.

text:
